title: pseudoeriosema andongense
intro: Pseudoeriosema andongense is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the Andong pea. This plant is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pseudoeriosema andongense include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and aiding in the management of diabetes. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and it is also sometimes used in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
